headline: Top-line missed barely, bottom-line was a disaster — but Q2 guide came in 7-10% above Street and FY revenue was raised.
realStoryHeadlines: US revenue actually declined −8% YoY ($530M vs $579M) — 4% total growth entirely from Eucalyptus/international
Compounded GLP-1 unwind: $33.5M restructuring charges drove 800 bps gross margin compression
Quality-of-revenue flag: receivables ballooned $32M → $150M against just $22M of YoY revenue growth
OpEx explosion ex-marketing: Ops +53%, Tech +57%, G&A +126%
Q2 guide $680-700M is the bull's hook — well above Street, implies sharp re-acceleration

frameworkOverride.rationale: TTM rev growth +59% in screener is stale (Q1 +4%). FY guide implies +19-28% YoY. But margin reset to 10-12% Adj EBITDA is atypical for healthy High Growth — forced rebase from GLP-1 pivot.
frameworkOverride.valuationTool: EV/Gross Profit (3.92x — low for High Growth)

tradingRead.earningsRule: Triggered today — structures across print correctly capped LOW conf. Q2 print is next binary.
tradingRead.postPrintIV: IV will collapse off print. Stock holding $25-28 post-call + credible branded GLP-1 roadmap → CSPs attractive.
tradingRead.longThesisGate: Requires conviction on (a) branded GLP-1 unit economics, (b) Eucalyptus integration not destroying margins, (c) $974M convertible debt non-dilution.
tradingRead.bottomLine: Direction binary on call commentary. Headline optics bearish; Q2 guide bullish. The call decides which narrative wins.
